item.title: I can’t draw but I consider this my art. Restored a classic Stingray in my garage.
item.description:
Day 1. She needs lots of body repair and some mechanical work.
Teaching myself fiberglass repair then applying it in small pieces around the entire body. Very satisfying work.
Most effort actually went underneath this bumper to reseat and bond the two panels before fixing fiberglass.
Brake repair. Everything had to go to remove brake lock gremlins.
Pneumatic headlight system overhaul.
Some minor interior aesthetic work to test future looks. Some people call this wasted effort, I call it fun.
Wheel strip/repaint day.
Covering up unsightly body lines.
Testing paint skills learned via YouTubeU. Priming for paint wasn’t too bad.
Primer day. Low humidity, high temp.
She’s one shade and has no body holes!!!
Post wet-sand and first coat of paint.
(Mostly) finished!
She turns heads.
A small city cruise with proper music on the radio.
item.dc:creator: iCommunicateInGifs

item.title: Who’s the dumbest person you’ve ever met?
item.description: From: https://www.reddit.com/r/AskReddit/comments/219w2o/whos_the_dumbest_person_youve_ever_met/?utm_source=share&utm_medium=mweb
item.dc:creator: minPD0309

item.title: Things I will miss
item.description:
My mom doesn't know how to send memes in a text message so when she finds one and thinks of me she emails it to herself puts it in a word document and takes a picture of it to send to me.
I absolutely love it. I haven't taught her how to send it directly to me because I love it so much.
Honestly don't think memes would be a thing if we all had to do that.
I will really miss getting these memes when she is gone. (She is 71) Fp edit. Wow my mom is internet famous nice. I called her and read all the comments to her. You guys made her smile and laugh and definitely made her concerned on what I'm doing in my free time. I never been on the front page. I know not your customs but I have seen people ask for things. So I guess give your mom a call or if you're adopted like me call whoever is your nom
item.dc:creator: necola

item.title: I got into the Doctor of Veterinary Medicine degree!
item.description: This is all I’ve been working towards for the last 4 years. I got the email a couple of days ago offering me a place at my first preference university. I start in February! I’m going to be a doctor!! Oh my god I’m terrified.

item.title: Day 239: of cheeseburgers I want inside of me

https://plumvillage.org/about/thich-nhat-hanh/biography/ I hope you learn a little about him and find some healing. His work as always been a source of peace.

item.title: What are some simple yet innovative ideas that can ease out day-to-day life issues?
item.description: A Mexican Student Invented a Bra that detects Cancer or Tumors in the Breasts. Julian Rios Cantu was inspired by his mother’s battle with breast cancer, which resulted in the removal of both breasts. Then he invented a bra that identifies cancer cells in their early stages. For his efforts, he was given the top prize of $20000 at the Global Student Entrepreneur Awards (GSEA). The bra has around 200 biosensors that map the exterior of the breast and may identify changes in temperature and blood circulation to the breast tissue. The increased blood flow suggests that something is feeding the blood vessels, which is usually cancer.
item.dc:creator: Ice2Ice2

145 Thank you, Usersub, for looking at my dump of mostly Scottish but all UK-related things. @Trynshady, I'm so pumped for our girl's trip! I'm praying the various Highland Games don't get cancelled so you can have extra fun lol Edit: Thanks for sticking with me for my sizeable dump...it was indeed time consuming but I feel so much lighter now that I'm able to share with everyone :)
